zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche De Waterton於大約1375年出生在英國賀福爾可雷登爾時，她的父親Hugh de Waterton53歲，母親Ellen Mowbray27歲。她於1393年與Sir Robert Challons結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1437年9月3日在英國戴文享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanche De Waterton于大约1375年出生在英国賀福爾可雷登爾时，她的父亲Hugh de Waterton53岁，母亲Ellen Mowbray27岁。她于1393年与Sir Robert Challons结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1437年9月3日在英国戴文享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Waterton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche De Waterton was born about 1375, in Credenhill, Herefordshire, England, her father, Hugh de Waterton, was 53 and her mother, Ellen Mowbray, was 27. She married Sir Robert Challons in 1393. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 September 1437, in Devon, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche De Waterton est née environ 1375, à Credenhill, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Waterton, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Ellen Mowbray, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Challons en 1393. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1437, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanche De Waterton um 1375 in Credenhill, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Waterton 53 und ihre Mutter Ellen Mowbray 27. Sie hat 1393 Sir Robert Challons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. September 1437 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche De Waterton è nata il circa 1375 nel Credenhill, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Hugh de Waterton, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Ellen Mowbray, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Challons nel 1393. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 settembre 1437, nel Devon, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanche De Watertonが約1375年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクレデンヒルで生まれた時，父Hugh de Watertonは53歳，母Ellen Mowbrayは27歳であった。1393年にSir Robert Challonsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1437年9月3日にイギリスデボンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche De Waterton(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 허퍼드실르 크레데힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Waterton(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Mowbray(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1393년 Sir Robert Challons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1437년 9월 3일 영국 데폰에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche De Waterton nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Credenhill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Waterton, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Mowbray, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Challons em 1393. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1437, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche De Waterton родилась около 1375 г. в местности креденилл, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Waterton было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen Mowbray, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Challons в 1393 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 сентября 1437 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanche De Waterton nació aproximadamente 1375, en Credenhill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Waterton, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Ellen Mowbray, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Challons en 1393. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1437, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
